title: The Return of Billy Jack
overview: Billy Jack returns to bring down a child pornography ring headed by the Godfather of Godfathers.  The Return of Billy Jack is an unfinished theatrical film that was in production from December 1985 to early 1986 in New York City with additional scenes filmed in Toronto.
